_comment: This is an EXAMPLE. Replace with your actual model config or drop your own JSON here.
_instructions: 1. Set 'feature_names' to exactly the same column names your model was trained on (same order!)
2. Set 'target' to the name of your target column (e.g. 'DGI')
4. Drop model.pkl alongside this file in the backend/ folder

metadata.description: Daily Growth Index prediction from solar and weather inputs
